message:
test(proptest): add 10 forensic type property tests + fix approval expiry test

Add comprehensive proptest coverage for 4 policy forensic types that had zero
coverage: ForensicAuditEntry, ForensicNamespaceEvent, ForensicComplianceSummary,
and ForensicReport. Tests include serde roundtrips (with f64 tolerance for
denial_rate_percent), behavioral invariants (denial rate bounded, denials <=
evaluations), and nested collection size preservation.

Also fixes cannot_approve_non_pending test: entries with expires_at_ms=0 (no
expiry) are never expired by expire_stale(), so the test now uses a non-zero
expiry to properly test the Expired→approve rejection path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
